prompt: Mock up a retro 80s video rental store website with VHS tape navigation, neon pink and blue color scheme, scanline effects, pixel art movie posters, and a membership card signup form
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a retro 80s video rental store website. The website features a predominant neon pink and electric blue color scheme with prominent scanline effects across the entire screen, mimicking a CRT display. A horizontal navigation bar, composed of pixelated VHS tapes serving as buttons, is positioned at the top of the page. The central content area showcases a grid of pixel art movie posters. A distinct membership card signup form, styled with an 80s retro user interface, is clearly visible in the bottom-right corner of the screen.
objects: Predominant neon pink and electric blue color scheme
Prominent scanline effects across the entire screen
Horizontal navigation bar at the top of the page
Pixelated VHS tapes serving as navigation buttons
Grid of pixel art movie posters
Membership card signup form in the bottom-right corner
